mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_verse_annotations WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_verse_annotations( id, user_id, version_id, book_id, chapter_number, start_verse, end_verse, selected_text, note_content, visibility, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{versionId}, #{bookId}, #{chapterNumber}, #{startVerse}, #{endVerse}, #{selectedText}, #{noteContent}, #{visibility}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_verse_annotations
selected_text = #{selectedText}, note_content = #{noteContent}, visibility = #{visibility}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_verse_annotations SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_verse_annotations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_verse_annotations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
